channel.title: easy-vegan-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh easy-vegan-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Honey Balsamic Roasted Cabbage That Melts Perfectly in Your Mouth
item.description: This roasted cabbage is a game changer—sweet honey and tangy balsamic glaze caramelize the edges, making it melt in your mouth. A simple side that feels fancy, perfect alongside any cozy dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 40 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 55 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium green cabbage, cut into 1-inch thick wedges
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
  • 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika (optional)
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #olive #balsamic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Honey Balsamic Roasted Cabbage That Melts Perfectly in Your Mouth
media:content.media:description: This roasted cabbage is a game changer—sweet honey and tangy balsamic glaze caramelize the edges, making it melt in your mouth. A simple side that feels fancy, perfect alongside any cozy dinner.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, medium, olive, balsamic

item.title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter That Everyone Will Love
item.description: These cabbage steaks get perfectly crispy edges and melt-in-your-mouth centers thanks to a garlic butter glaze. Such an easy side that feels fancy enough for dinner guests or a cozy weeknight.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large green cabbage, sliced into 1-inch thick steaks
  • 4 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #unsalted #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Crispy Roasted Cabbage Steaks with Garlic Butter That Everyone Will Love
media:content.media:description: These cabbage steaks get perfectly crispy edges and melt-in-your-mouth centers thanks to a garlic butter glaze. Such an easy side that feels fancy enough for dinner guests or a cozy weeknight.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, unsalted, cloves

item.title: Fun and Tasty St. Patrick’s Day Rainbow Veggie Wraps Kids Will Adore
item.description: These colorful veggie wraps are a fun way to celebrate St. Patrick’s Day with the kids. Packed with fresh crunchy veggies and a creamy avocado spread, they’re perfect for lunch or a festive snack.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 15 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 large whole wheat tortillas
  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and mashed
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1 cup shredded carrots
  • 1 cup thinly sliced cucumbers
  • 1 cup thinly sliced red bell pepper
  • 1 cup baby spinach leaves
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #avocado #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fun and Tasty St. Patrick’s Day Rainbow Veggie Wraps Kids Will Adore
media:content.media:description: These colorful veggie wraps are a fun way to celebrate St. Patrick’s Day with the kids. Packed with fresh crunchy veggies and a creamy avocado spread, they’re perfect for lunch or a festive snack.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, avocado, tablespoon

item.title: Delicious Protein Coffee Smoothie for a Healthy Boost
item.description: This protein coffee smoothie is a game-changer for busy mornings. Packed with nutrients and flavor, it's perfect for a quick breakfast or post-workout boost!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 10 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup brewed coffee, cooled
  • 1 banana, frozen
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt
  • 1 scoop protein powder (vanilla or chocolate)
  • 1 tablespoon almond butter
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • Ice cubes (optional, for thickness)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #brewed #banana #greek

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Delicious Protein Coffee Smoothie for a Healthy Boost
media:content.media:description: This protein coffee smoothie is a game-changer for busy mornings. Packed with nutrients and flavor, it's perfect for a quick breakfast or post-workout boost!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230119510, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, brewed, banana, greek

item.title: Creamy Cold Brew Coffee: Refreshing Mornings Made Easy
item.description: Start your day with this creamy cold brew coffee that combines smooth coffee with a hint of vanilla and sweetness. Perfect for warm mornings or a refreshing afternoon break, this beverage is easy to make and incredibly satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 10 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup (240ml) cold brew coffee, brewed and chilled
  • 1/2 cup (120ml) milk or cream (dairy or non-dairy alternatives like almond or oat milk)
  • 1 tablespoon (15ml) vanilla syrup (adjust to taste)
  • Ice cubes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230119510 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #coffee #cream #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Cold Brew Coffee: Refreshing Mornings Made Easy
media:content.media:description: Start your day with this creamy cold brew coffee that combines smooth coffee with a hint of vanilla and sweetness. Perfect for warm mornings or a refreshing afternoon break, this beverage is easy to make and incredibly satisfying.
